property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - If you have only Androids, styled cards you play to stop an energy attack cost -1 stage, to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If your opponent has any Super Saiyans, then when you Refocus with this attack, it does +3 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - If you have only Androids, attacks performed by your Androids do +1 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: You may remove this Support from the game to shuffle up to 4 cards from your discards into your life deck. CONSTANT - Attacks performed by your Androids do +1 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Prevent X damage from a physical attack. X = the number of cards in your removed from the game pile, to a max of 6.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: MASTERY - If you Refocus with this attack, remove from the game 2 styled cards from your opponent's discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If your MP's level is 3 or higher, this card's base cost is 1 instead.) 2: MASTERY - This attack's base damage is 6 instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Remove from the game 1 styled card from your opponent's discards. Your opponent may discard a card from his hand. If he does not, your next attack this Combat costs -X stages. X = the base cost of the removed card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: MASTERY - Stop an energy attack. Remove from the game a styled card from your opponent's discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you have removed from the game 2 or more cards from your opponent's discards this turn, this attack does +1 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Charge 3. MASTERY - Knockback 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: The next time one of your Black styled attacks deals 7 or more damage this Combat, you may put in play a Black styled Support from your discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you have removed from the game 4 or more cards from your opponent's discards this turn, your next Black styled attack this Combat gains "Unstoppable" and does +2 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: MASTERY - This attack gains "Knockback 1" and its base damage is 5 instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If your MP's level is 3 or higher, this card's base damage is AT instead.) 1: Knockback 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If you Charge with this card, you may remove it from the game to draw a card.) 1: You may remove from the game a Blue styled attack from your hand to put in play a Blue styled Support from your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: CONSTANT - When you Charge one of your Blue styled attacks, your opponent's next attack that turn does -1 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: For this turn, the Charge on your Blue styled cards gains +2.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Search your life deck for a Blue styled Support and discard it. If you do, you do not have to discard a card for your next Charge this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: SUCCESSFUL - If you Charged this attack, gain 1 stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Your next Blue styled attack this turn gains, "SUCCESSFUL - You may play a Blue styled Support from your hand."

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If your opponent Refocuses against this attack, draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Charge 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop a physical attack. You may search your life deck for a Blue styled Support and discard it.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Put in play a Freestyle Support from your hand and take X damage. X = the base cost of that Support.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you have Tien, you may discard a card from your hand to put into your hand a Freestyle Support from your discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 1: If you have Tien, you may search your life deck for a Named Support and put it into play.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Alien; Android

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If your opponent has any Super Saiyans, he randomly discards a card from his hand.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Human

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If Goku is your MP, you do not have to discard for your Mastery this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: If you have 3 or more Gohan Named cards in your discards, attacks performed by your Super Saiyans do +3 damage this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: If Gohan is your MP, the next styled attack he performs this Combat does +2 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: SUCCESSFUL - If you have Gohan, the next styled attack he Refocuses with this Combat costs -1 stage, to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you have only Aliens and you Refocus with this attack, its damage gains +2.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: If you have only Aliens, the next 2 cards you Refocus with this Combat cost -2 stages, to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you have Refocused in your opponent's last Attack Phase this Combat, this attack does +4 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 1: You may remove from the game 3 Krillin Named cards from your discards to put into your hand a Krillin Named attack from your discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: CONSTANT - While the top card of your discards is Namekian styled, your Freestyle attacks do +1 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: You may rearrange the top X cards of your discards. X = your MP's base PUR.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Charge 2.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Knockback 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: You may remove from the game up to 3 Freestyle cards from your discards. Your next Namekian styled attack this Combat does +X damage. X = the number of cards you removed this way.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If your MP is level 3 or higher, this card's base cost is 2 instead.) 4: If you Refocus with this attack and the top card of your discards is Namekian styled, this attack's damage gains +3.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: SUCCESSFUL - Knockback 2.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, MASTERY: For this turn, Orange styled Supports you have cannot be discarded or removed by your opponent's effects.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: MASTERY - This attack's base damage is 7 instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If your MP's level is 3 or higher, this card's base damage is AT instead.) 1: MASTERY - If you have at least one styled Support, your opponent takes 2 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1, Mastery: CONSTANT - When you play an Orange styled attack that is removed from the game after use, you may remove this card from the game to discard that attack instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Your opponent chooses an Orange styled Support in your discards. If it is a copy of a Support you have, put it at the bottom of your life deck. Otherwise, put it in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Knockback 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop an energy attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Prevent X damage from a physical attack. X = the number of Orange styled Supports you played and/or put in play this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2, MASTERY: Remove from the game X Orange styled Supports you have to remove from the game 2 of your opponent's Supports in play with a base cost of X or less.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck) 1, Mastery: CONSTANT - Your opponent's Knockbacks and Charges gain -2.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Your opponent reveals his hand. For each Support revealed this way, you may remove from the game one Orange styled Support you have to discard that Support from his hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: SUCCESSFUL - If you played and/or put in play 1 or more Orange styled Supports this turn, prevent 2 damage from your opponent's next attack this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When an attack from one of your Nameks does 6 or more damage, you may put your top Namekian styled discard at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If your opponent has any Androids, those personalities must pay +1 stage when they play a card to stop an energy attack this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you have only Nameks, your next attack this Combat gains "Knockback 4."

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If your other personalities are Humans, you may discard a Puar Named card from your hand to search your life deck for a Named card of the same type and put it in your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: If Yamcha is your MP, his PUR gains +2 for this turn and the next.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: For this turn, when your opponent does not stop and/or prevent damage from any of your Red styled attacks, he discards the top 2 cards of his life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop an energy attack. If you use a Red styled attack in your next Attack Phase, you may increase the base cost of that attack by +1 to do +2 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: CONSTANT - When your opponent Refocuses, you may remove from the game the top 2 cards of your discards. If you do, his refocused attacks do -1 damage this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Charge 2. If you Charged this attack with a Red styled card, your opponent takes 1 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: If your opponent has not Refocused this Combat, this attack gains "SUCCESSFUL - Capture!"

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop a physical attack. MASTERY - If your opponent has not Refocused this turn, he takes 3 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: When you Refocus against a styled attack this turn, you may put a card from your hand at the bottom of your life deck to draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Prevent 3 damage from a physical attack. MASTERY - If your opponent has not Refocused this turn, prevent 5 damage from a physical attack instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: MASTERY - If you Refocus this attack, its damage gains +2.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Knockback 1. If your opponent has not Refocused this Combat, this card has "Knockback 2" instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3, Saiyan: CONSTANT - Your first Saiyan styled attack each Combat does +1 damage and gains "SUCCESSFUL - Capture!"

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If your MP is both a "Saiyan" and an "Alien," then for this turn attacks performed by your MP do +1 damage for each other Saiyan and/or Alien you have.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop a physical attack. MASTERY - If your opponent does not have a Saiyan, gain 1 stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you have 2 or more personalities that have 2 or more traits each, this card gains "Knockback 2."

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: For this turn, you may gain 1 stage when you play and/or put in play a Dragon Ball.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: If you have 3 or more Dragon Balls, each of your opponent's attacks do -1 damage this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 0, Mastery: Choose a Dragon Ball you have. For this turn, your opponent cannot capture that Dragon Ball.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Prevent X damage from a styled physical attack. X = the number of traits your personalities have.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: MASTERY - You may shuffle into your life deck a Dragon Ball from your discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1, Saiyan: If this attack is stopped, you may put an Event from your discards into your hand. SUCCESSFUL - Knockback 2.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you have only Humans, then when you Refocus with this attack its damage gains +3.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 2 per deck.) 1: Your opponent may remove from the game up to 4 cards from his discards. Your next styled attack this Combat costs -X stages, to a minimum of 1. X = the number of cards your opponent didn't remove this way.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Human

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When this personality performs a successful energy attack, your opponent reveals a random card from his hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Remove from the game an attack in your opponent's discards. For this Combat, prevent 2 damage from your opponent's attacks of that type.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If your opponent has any Androids, he takes 2 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If your MP is a Human, you may remove from the game a Freestyle Support in your discards to put in play a copy of that Support from your discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: CONSTANT - If you have only Humans, prevent 1 damage from all of your opponent's styled attacks.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If one of your Supports was discarded this Combat, you may draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: If you have Puar, discard an opponent's Support in play and draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: If you have only Androids and your opponent prevents damage from this attack, you may have this personality gain X stages. X = the damage prevented, to a max of 4.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 1: If your opponent performed a successful styled energy attack in his last Attack Phase this Combat, gain X stages. X = the base cost of that attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Choose one of your opponent's Allies. This personality may gain X stages. X = the number of stages the Ally is above 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 7: This attack does +X damage. X = the number of energy attacks you stopped this Combat. SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: MASTERY - If your MP is level 3 or higher and at 0, gain 2 stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Charge 2. SUCCESSFUL - If you discarded a Black styled card to Charge this attack, draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Stop an energy attack. MASTERY - Your opponent's MP's PUR gains -1 for this turn and the next.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: Draw a card. MASTERY - Your opponent discards a card from his hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: MASTERY - If your opponent's removed from game pile has 5 or more cards than your removed from game pile, his next styled attack this Combat costs +2 stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Prevent 8 damage from a styled physical attack. If you have a Mastery, you may stop a physical attack instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If your MP's level 3 or more, this card's base cost is 2 instead.) 3: Remove from the game X styled cards from your opponent's discards. X = your MP's level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: MASTERY - If your opponent has more cards removed from the game than you do, your opponent randomly discards a card from his hand and draws a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: MASTERY - If your opponent has more cards in his hand than you, this attack does +X damage. X = the number of cards in his hand more than yours.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: If you performed 2 or more Unstoppable attacks this turn, this attack gains "Unstoppable" and "Unpreventable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: SUCCESSFUL - If you discarded 1 or more cards from your opponent's hand with one of your effects this turn, you may discard a card from your hand to draw 2 cards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: MASTERY - If your MP's current power rating is 4,000 or less, you may put a Black styled Support from your discards into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 3: If you Refocus with this attack, you may put in play a Named Support from your discards. Remove that Support from the game when you use it or at the end of Combat, whichever happens first.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Knockback 2.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 5: This attack does +X damage. X = the number of times you Charged this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you Refocus with this attack, any Knockback on your opponent's attack gains -1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Stop an energy attack. You may remove from the game any number of Blue styled Supports from your discards. Your next Blue styled attack this Combat costs -X stages, to a minimum of 1. X = the number of Supports you removed this way.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: SUCCESSFUL - For this turn, when you Charge one of your Blue styled energy attacks, you may put a card from your discards at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Remove from the game any number of Blue styled Supports from your discards. Put in play a Blue styled Support from your discards with a base cost less than the number of cards you removed this way.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Stop a physical attack. Your next Blue styled card played this turn costs -1 stage, to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When your opponent plays a Freestyle Event or a Freestyle Support, you may discard a card from your hand to have him to take 4 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - If you have only Humans, you may draw a card when your opponent plays a Freestyle card.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 1: If Frieza is your MP and you have only Aliens, each of your opponent's personalities loses X stages. X = the number of Aliens you have.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Human

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you have a Mastery, draw a card and gain 1 stage.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Super Saiyan

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When you Charge an attack, you may discard a card to draw a card. If you do, your opponent cannot Charge his attacks this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 6: If your opponent's MP is a Super Saiyan, this attack does -4 damage. MASTERY - If you have Frieza, he may gain 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1, Mastery: At the end of Combat, you may search your life deck for a Support with a Constant effect and put it in play. If your opponent has that Support in play, you may discard his copy.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Namek: If you have 6 or more Namekian styled cards in your discards, discard an opponent's Support in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: SUCCESSFUL - Remove from the game the top card of your discards. If it's a Namekian styled card, you may discard a Support in play with the same base cost as the removed card.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Remove from the game the top card of your discards. If that card is Namekian styled, put 3 Namekian styled cards from your discards at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1, Mastery: Remove from the game the top card of your discards. If that card is Namekian styled, your opponent's MP cannot gain stages this turn. If it is not Namekian styled, your opponent's Allies cannot gain stages this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Stop an energy attack. MASTERY - Stop an energy attack in your opponent's next Attack Phase this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: SUCCESSFUL, MASTERY - Your opponent may take 3 damage. If he does not, choose an opponent's Ally in play. That Ally cannot perform attacks this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop a physical attack. If you have 2 or more Nameks, you may put this card at the bottom of your life deck after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: If the top card of your discards is Namekian styled, your opponent's personalities cannot gain stages this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: If the top 3 cards of your discards are Namekian styled, all your opponent's Allies lose 1 stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: Stop an energy attack. You may discard an Orange styled Support from your hand. If you do, your opponent cannot use Supports this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Charge 3. You may remove from the game an Orange styled Support you have to double this attack's base damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3, Mastery: CONSTANT - When you Charge one of your Orange styled attacks, you may remove this card from the game instead of discarding a card. If you do, the base Charge of that attack is doubled.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Charge 2. SUCCESSFUL - You may remove an Orange styled Support you have from the game to have the cost of your next Orange styled attack this Combat gain -2 stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: MASTERY - If you Refocus with this attack, its base damage is X instead. X = the number of Orange styled Supports you have in your removed from the game pile.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: MASTERY - This attack does +X damage. X = the level of the personality performing this attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: Put in play an Orange styled Support from your hand that has a base cost of 2 stages or less. If you do, draw a card for each other Support you have with the same title as the one you put in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Stop a physical attack. If you have a Mastery, you may discard an Orange styled Support from your hand to draw 2 cards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: You may remove from the game up to 3 Orange styled Supports you have to prevent X damage from all of your opponent's attacks this Combat. X = 2 times the number of Supports you removed this way.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When your opponent performs an attack and the top card of your discards is Namekian styled, prevent 1 damage from that attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Once per turn during your Attack Phase, you may discard a card from your hand to gain X stages. X = the base cost of the discarded card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 1: You may lose X stages to put a styled card with a base cost of X from your discards into your hand. If you have Yamcha, draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 2: If you attacked with a Red styled card in your last Attack Phase and your opponent Refocused against it, your MP gains X stages. X = the sum of the base costs of those 2 attacks.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: MASTERY - If your opponent Refocuses against this attack, shuffle into your life deck 4 Red styled attacks from your discards with the same base cost as your opponent's attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: SUCCESSFUL - If your opponent Refocused against this attack, draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Stop a physical attack. MASTERY - The next card your opponent Refocuses with this turn costs +1 stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: MASTERY - This attack's base damage is AT instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Stop an energy attack. If you performed 2 or more successful Red styled attacks this Combat, gain 2 stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: SUCCESSFUL - You may shuffle a card from your hand into your life deck to draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 5: MASTERY - Knockback 4. Charge 3.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: Reveal the top card of your life deck. If it is Red styled, put it into your hand, and for this turn your opponent cannot Refocus against attacks with the same title as the revealed card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: Knockback 2. MASTERY - If your MP's level is higher than your opponent's MP's level, this attack does +3 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: MASTERY - When you Refocus with this attack, the next attack your opponent Refocuses with this turn does -2 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 2: Shuffle 3 Named cards from your discards into your life deck to draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: If your opponent played a Named card this Combat, then the next Named attack you Refocus with this Combat costs -2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: If you captured 2 or more Dragon Balls this Combat, search your life deck for a Saiyan styled Support and put it in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: If you have 3 or more Saiyans, your next Saiyan styled attack this Combat gains "Unpreventable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Stop a physical attack. MASTERY - If you have 5 or more Dragon Balls, search your life deck for a Dragon Ball and put it in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: This attack does -1 damage for each non-Saiyan trait on each of your opponent's personalities.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Charge 2. If you Charge this attack with a Saiyan styled Physical or Energy Combat card, you may choose a personality in play to gain the "Saiyan" trait for this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Charge 3. If you Charged this attack with a Saiyan styled card, your opponent cannot capture this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop an energy attack. If you have 3 or more personalities with 2 or more traits each, you may put in play a Dragon Ball from your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When one of your opponent's Saiyans and/or Nameks performs an attack, he takes 2 damage.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Super Saiyan; Human

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: SUCCESSFUL - Prevent X damage from your opponent's energy attacks this Combat. X = the number of Saiyans you have.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 7: If your opponent has any Aliens, they cannot gain stages this Combat. SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When you play a card that has Knockback, your opponent takes X damage. X = sum of that card's Knockbacks.

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: Your opponent's Saiyans all lose 1 stage and this personality gains X stages. X = the number of stages lost this way.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - If you have only Humans and/or Animals, prevent 3 damage from all of your opponent's Freestyle attacks.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - The first styled energy attack this personality performs each Combat has a base cost of 1 stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 6: MASTERY - If you have only Androids, you may put in play a Named Support from your discards. SUCCESFUL - Capture!

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: If you have only Androids, each of your Allies gains 1 stage. If your Allies are at 5 above 0, this personality gains 2 stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: Stop a styled energy attack. Gain X stages. X = the base cost of that energy attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Your opponent may lose up to 3 stages. Remove from the game up to X cards from his discards. X = the number of stages he did not lose.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 5: If this attack is Unstoppable, it gains "Unpreventable." SUCCESSFUL - Knockback 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: MASTERY - Capture! SUCCESSFUL - Remove from the game X styled cards in your opponent's discards. X = the number of Dragon Balls you have.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card costs -1 stage while your opponent has more cards removed than you do.) 3, Mastery: Stop a physical attack. If this card stopped an attack that has a base cost of 4 or more, your opponent discards a card from his hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: At the start of each turn, you may remove from the game up to 2 styled cards from your opponent's discards. If you removed at least 1, the first Black styled attack you perform that turn costs -1 stage to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: CONSTANT - During your attack phase, if you remove from the game 4 or more cards from your opponent's discards with a card effect, then your next attack that Combat gains "Unstoppable."

property.name: Text
property.value: Your Blue styled energy attacks gain "Charge 3." Once per turn when you Charge one of your Blue styled energy attacks, you may put into your hand a Blue styled Support from your discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: Charge 2. SUCCESSFUL - If you Charged this attack, your opponent cannot discard your Blue styled Supports this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck. If you Charge with this card, you may remove it from the game. If you do, then you do not have to discard to Charge your other Blue styled attacks for this turn.) 1:

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: You may discard any number of Blue styled cards from your hand. Put in play a Blue styled Support from your discards that has a base cost of X or less. X = the number of cards you discarded this way.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Put in play a Blue styled Support from your hand that has a base cost of X or less. X = the number of Blue styled attacks you Charged this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: Your opponent chooses 2 Supports in your discards with different titles. You may remove one of them from the game to put the other in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2, Mastery: For this turn, when you Charge with a Blue styled card, you may search your life deck for a copy of that card and put it in your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: MASTERY - This attack does +X damage. X = the number of other Blue styled physical attacks you performed this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: The next time you Charge an attack this Combat and the top card of your discards is styled, you may remove that card from the game instead of discarding to Charge.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: If you have 3 or more cards in your discards, your opponent chooses 3 of them. Put one of those cards into your hand and remove from the game the remaining cards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Stop a physical attack. MASTERY - The first Namekian styled card you play in your opponent's next Attack phase this Combat has a base cost of 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 2: Randomly reveal a card from your hand. If it's Namekian styled, your opponent takes 3 damage. If it's not Namekian styled, you may discard it to search your life deck for a Namekian styled card with a base cost of 2 or less and put it in your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 4: For this turn and the next, the cost of your Namekian Styled Events and Supports gains -X stages to a minimum of 1. X = the number of Nameks you have.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: Reveal the top 5 cards in your discards. This attack does +X damage. X = the number Namekian styled cards revealed.

property.name: Text
property.value: When you perform a Namekian styled attack, reveal the top card of your discards. If that card is Namekian styled, your attack does +2 damage. If it is not Namekian styled, you may put that card at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 5, Namek: If the top 3 cards of your discards are Namekian styled, this attack does +AT damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: You may discard a Namekian styled card from your hand. If you do, your next styled attack this Combat from a Namek gains "Unpreventable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you have 8 or more Namekian styled cards in your discards, you may discard an opponent's Support in play. If you do, put in play a Namekian styled Support from your discards that has the same base cost as your opponent's Support.

property.name: Text
property.value: Twice per turn when one of your styled attacks deals 5 or more damage, you may discard a styled card from your hand to put in play a styled Support from your removed from game pile and have your opponent take 3 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 5: This attack's base damage is 9 unless you have 2 or more Orange styled Supports in your removed from the game pile.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 4: SUCCESSFUL - Your opponent chooses your removed from game pile or your discards. Gain X stages. X = the number of Orange styled Supports in the chosen pile.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck.) 4: CONSTANT - While your MP's power rating is 4,000 or less, you may draw a card after you take 7 or more damage from an attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: This attack does +X damage. X = the number of Orange styled Supports in your removed from game pile.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1, Mastery: For this turn, while your MP's current power rating is 1,000 or less, Orange styled attacks performed by your MP do +X damage. X = the base cost of the attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Your Orange styled attacks do +1 damage this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If your MP is level 3 or higher, then when you attack or refocus with this attack, its damage gains +3.

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: SUCCESSFUL - If your have only Nameks, your PUR gains +1 for this turn and the next.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Put your top Red styled discard at the bottom of your life deck. Your next Red styled attack this turn gains "Unpreventable" if it has the same base cost as the card you put at the bottom.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: SUCCESSFUL, MASTERY - You do not have to pay for the next styled attack you Refocus with this Combat, if its base cost is more than your opponent's attack's base cost.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: You may discard a Red styled card from your hand to put in play a Red styled Support from your discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2, Mastery: Draw the top card of your discards. For this turn, your opponent cannot Refocus against your styled attacks that have the same base cost as the card you drew.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2, Mastery: SUCCESSFUL - If your opponent has not Refocused this Combat, he cannot play and/or use an attack in his next Attack Phase this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your opponent can only Refocus against your styled cards if his attack's base cost is equal to or higher than your attack's base cost. Once per game during your Attack Phase, you may search your life deck for a styled Support with a Constant effect and put it in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: At the start of Combat, you may choose a personality you have. If you do, the chosen personality gains the trait "Saiyan". When you perform an attack with a personality that has a gained trait, that attacks damage gains +1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3, Mastery: Reveal the top X cards of your life deck. X = the total personalities you have with 2 or more traits. For each card revealed, your opponent may take 1 damage to put it at the bottom of your life deck. Otherwise, put it in your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2, Saiyan: You may discard a Saiyan styled card from your hand to put a Dragon Ball from your discards into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1, Mastery: If you have 2 or more Dragon Balls, this attack does +X damage. X = the number of Dragon Balls you have times 2.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: If your MP's level is higher than the number of Dragon Balls you have, search your life deck for a Dragon Ball and put it in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: SUCCESSFUL, MASTERY - If your opponent has a Dragon Ball, he may take 3 damage. Otherwise, you may capture a Dragon Ball.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: Draw the bottom card of your discards. If one of your personalities gained a trait this turn, gain 1 stage.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Human

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you have only Saiyans and/or only Humans, this attack does +2 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 4: SUCCESSFUL - Search your life deck for a Trunks Named attack and put it into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1, Mastery: SUCCESSFUL - If your opponent's PUR is greater than yours, he takes X damage. X = the difference in your PURs.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: SUCCESSFUL - If your opponent has any Androids, then for this turn, he cannot stop physical attacks performed by your Vegeta.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: CONSTANT - While your Vegeta is a Super Saiyan, all Named attacks performed by him do +1 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: If you passed in 3 or more consecutive Attack Phases this Combat, you may discard your hand to draw the same number of cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Search your life deck for a card that can stop an energy attack and put it in your hand. If you do, this personality gains X stages. X = the base cost of that card.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When this personality plays a Named card, your opponent may lose 2 stages. Otherwise, this personality gains X stages. X = the base cost of the Named card.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Super Saiyan

property.name: Text
property.value: 1, Mastery: SUCCESSFUL - Take X damage to gain X stages. X = the number of different card types in your discards, to a max of 3.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When you perform a Namekian styled attack, you may remove from the game the top card of your discards. If that card is a Freestyle card, gain 1 stage.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Super Saiyan; Human

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When your opponent Refocuses against one of your styled attacks, gain 1 stage.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Super Saiyan

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Charge 2. If you discarded a styled card to Charge this attack, gain 1 stage.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Alien; Android

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: You may choose for this attack's base damage to be X instead. X = the number of stages this personality gained during this turn's Power Up Step.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When your Alien Allies gain any stage(s) from a card effect, they gain that amount +1 instead. When your Ally performs an energy attack as your first attack in a turn, it costs -1 stage.
